languages.text: {n}Лежащий на койке так же не отрывает от вас мутного взгляда. Его руки, крепко прижатые к койке ремнями, вздрагивают, лицо оскаливается в гримасе.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Лежащий на койке так же не отрывает от вас мутного взгляда, полностью отвлекаясь от происходящих над ним манипуляций. Его руки, крепко прижатые к койке ремнями, вздрагивают, лицо оскаливается в гримасе.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The man in the bed stares back at you through glassy eyes. His arms, held tightly to the bed by straps, shudder, his face contorting in a grimace.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Лежащий на койке так же не отрывает от вас мутного взгляда. Его руки, крепко прижатые к койке ремнями, вздрагивают, лицо оскаливается в гримасе.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The man in the bed stares back at you through glassy eyes. His arms, held tightly to the bed by straps, shudder, his face contorting in a grimace.{/n}
{n}The man in the bed stares back at you through glassy eyes. His arms, held tightly to the bed by straps, shudder, his face contorting in a grimace.{/n}
{n}The man in the bed stares back at you through glassy eyes. His arms, held tightly to the bed by straps, shudder, his face contorting in a grimace.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ベッドの男は、虚ろな目であなたをじっと見返している。腕は拘束帯でベッドに固く縛り付けられ、身を震わせ、顔は苦悶に歪んでいる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man in the bed stares back at you through glassy eyes. His arms, held tightly to the bed by straps, shudder, his face contorting in a grimace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ベッドの男は、虚ろな目であなたをじっと見返している。腕は拘束帯でベッドに固く縛り付けられ、身を震わせ、顔は苦悶に歪んでいる。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'homme sur la table vous renvoie un regard vitreux. Ses bras, fermement maintenus en place par des lanières, frissonnent tandis qu'une grimace déforme son visage.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man in the bed stares back at you through glassy eyes. His arms, held tightly to the bed by straps, shudder, his face contorting in a grimace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'homme sur la table vous renvoie un regard vitreux. Ses bras, fermement maintenus en place par des lanières, frissonnent tandis qu'une grimace déforme son visage.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yataktaki adam, cam gibi gözlerle sana bakıyor. Kayışlarla yatağa sıkıca tutturulmuş kolları titriyor, yüzü acıyla buruşuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man in the bed stares back at you through glassy eyes. His arms, held tightly to the bed by straps, shudder, his face contorting in a grimace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yataktaki adam, cam gibi gözlerle sana bakıyor. Kayışlarla yatağa sıkıca tutturulmuş kolları titriyor, yüzü acıyla buruşuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Mann auf dem Bett erwidert deinen Blick mit glasigen Augen. Seine zuckenden Arme sind am Bett fixiert, sein Gesicht ist zu einer Grimasse verzogen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man in the bed stares back at you through glassy eyes. His arms, held tightly to the bed by straps, shudder, his face contorting in a grimace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Mann auf dem Bett erwidert deinen Blick mit glasigen Augen. Seine zuckenden Arme sind am Bett fixiert, sein Gesicht ist zu einer Grimasse verzogen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El hombre de la cama te mira con ojos vidriosos. Sus brazos, atados firmemente con correas a la cama, se estremecen. Su rostro se retuerce en una mueca.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man in the bed stares back at you through glassy eyes. His arms, held tightly to the bed by straps, shudder, his face contorting in a grimace.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El hombre de la cama te mira con ojos vidriosos. Sus brazos, atados firmemente con correas a la cama, se estremecen. Su rostro se retuerce en una mueca.{/n}

languages.text: {n}病床上的男人透过浑浊的双眼回望着你。他被束缚带紧紧绑在床上的手臂不住地颤抖，面部因痛苦而扭曲。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man in the bed stares back at you through glassy eyes. His arms, held tightly to the bed by straps, shudder, his face contorting in a grimace.{/n}
